title: PCC559 Medium Preparation Protocol
author: Roscoff Culture Collection
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.s54eg8w

steps.title: Under hood, add these nutriments autoclaved...
steps.instruction: Under hood, add these nutriments autoclaved before (excepted vitamin): %s %s Filter the medium on 0,2microns

steps.title: Dissolve these salts in the volume...
steps.instruction: Dissolve these salts in the volume of water indicated %s %s Mix the solutions in the order indicated Complete final volume to 1L of distilled water Autoclave Store in refrigerator

steps.title: To 10mL of HCl 0,1N, add...
steps.instruction: To 10mL of HCl 0,1N, add gradually 270mg of Ferric chloride hexahydrate (FeCl3-6H2O) To 10mL of NaOH 0,1N, add gradually 372mg of Titriplex III dihydrate (EDTA-Na2) Mix both solutions Complete final volume to 500mL of sterile water Store in refrigerator

steps.title: Dissolve these salts in the volume of water indicated
steps.instruction: Dissolve these salts in the volume of water indicated : %s %s Mix the solutions in the order indicated Complete final volume to 1L of sterile water Store 6 months in refrigerator Attention: dilute 10 times with sterile water and filter on 0.2 microns before use

steps.title: Prepare two solutions
steps.instruction: Prepare two solutions : Dissolve 3,45g of monosodium dihydrogen phosphate (NaH2PO

steps.title: in 50mL of water Dissolve 4,45g...
steps.instruction: in 50mL of water Dissolve 4,45g of di-sodium hydrogenophosphate dihydrate (Na2HPo4-2H2O) in 50mL of water Make an equimolar mixture of this two solutions and adjust the pH at 7,5 Store in refrigerator Ammonium sulfate solution (100 mM) To 250mL of distilled water, add 3,3g of ammonium sulfate ((NH4)2SO

steps.title: Autoclave the solution Store in refrigerator...
steps.instruction: Autoclave the solution Store in refrigerator Sodium hydrogenocarbonate solution (1 M) To 300mL of distilled water, add 25,2g of sodium hydrogenocarbonate (NaHCO

steps.title: Autoclave the solution Store in refrigerator...
steps.instruction: Autoclave the solution Store in refrigerator Vitamin B12 (Cyanocobalamin) To 20mL of distilled water, add 20mg of vitamin B12 Filter on 0,2 microns (=stock solution at 1mg/mL)) Store in freezer The working solution (10µg/mL) is prepared by aseptical dilution of the vitamin B12 stock solution with sterile water
